name: api-test-studio
description: Single-file Scalar/Postman-style runner. App lives on GitHub Pages; only the local CORS proxy runs on this machine so you can hit localhost / private APIs from the deployed page.

scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently -k -n web,proxy -c green,blue "npx --yes serve . -l 5173 --no-clipboard" "node proxy.js"
scripts.worker:kv: cd worker && npx wrangler kv:namespace create STATE
